nasb.text: And on this mountain He will swallow up the covering which is over all peoples, Even the veil which is stretched over all nations.

esv.text: And he will swallow up on this mountain the covering that is cast over all peoples, the veil that is spread over all nations.

cnv.text: 他又必在這山上除滅那遮蓋萬民的面巾，和那遮蓋列國的帕子。

ccb.text: 在这山上，祂必除去遮蔽万民的面纱和笼罩万国的幔子。

csbs.text: 在这山上， 他必除灭遮住万民的遮布， 罩在万国之上的罩单；
